MINI MINUTES: Defendant JOHN SHIELLS's Motion for Reconsideration of Order: O F F C A L E N D A R per moving party. (JJM/KH) LEE BATARA, CSR 3759

Notice Of Motion For Reconsideration Of Order Granting Ex Parte Application For Stay; Alternatively To Vacate Or Modify Order An Stay; Memo P/A; Declarations
Off Calendar Mar-20-2002 Continued To Apr-03-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Mark J. Romeo, Esq. 362-1717 for defendant JOHN SHIELLS demurring party
Counsel represented in open court that both parties have reached a settlement and requested that this matter be continued to allow said settlement to finalize. Court continued this matter to APRIL 3, 2002. (JJM/kh) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855

Notice Of Motion For Reconsideration Of Order Granting Ex Parte Application For Stay; Alternatively To Vacate Or Modify Order An Stay; Memo P/A; Declarations
Off Calendar Feb-26-2002 Continued To Mar-20-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
COURT CALL APPEARANCE:
David M. Trapani, Esq. 408/984-2880 for Plaintiff and opposing party

APPEARANCE:
Mark Romeo, Esq. 362-1717 for defendant JOHN SHIELLS moving for reconsideration of Order Granting ex-parte application for a stay moving party
Mr. Trapani did not file any opposition to this motion. He was on vacation. Court continued this matter to MARCH 20, 2002. Mr. Trapani to file his opposition by March 8th; any reply thereto by March 14th. (JJM/kh) Eric Throne, CSR 7855

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-26-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
COURT CALL APPEARANCE:
David M. Trapani, Esq. 408/984-2880 for Plaintiff and opposing party

APPEARANCE:
Mark Romeo, Esq. 362-1717 for Defendants and demurring party
Mr. Trapani did not file any opposition to the demurrer. He was on vacation. However, both counsel stipulated in open court that the demurrer may be sustained with leave to amend. The Amended Complaint is to be filed by March 8, 2002.
(JJM/KH) Eric Throne, CSR 7855
